zh.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm是Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm的女兒，於大約1634年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾。她於大約1658年與Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm是Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm的女儿，于大约1634年出生在英国苏格兰培爾。她于大约1658年与Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Chisholm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Chisholme near Hawick in southern Scotland, which derives its name from Old English c̄se, cēse ‘cheese’ (from Latin caseus) + holm ‘piece of dry land in a fen’ and refers to a waterside meadow good for dairy farming and hence for producing cheeses. In the 14th century members of this family migrated to the Highlands, settling in Strathglass, where their name was Gaelicized as Siosal.

variants.name: Chisom
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Yorkshire but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisam
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Cumbria but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisum
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chislom
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm   or   Chisolm  .

variants.name: Chezem
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm  . Compare   Chisum  .

en.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm was born about 1634, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm. She married Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers about 1658. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm est née environ 1634, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm. Elle a épousé Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers environ 1658. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm wurde um 1634 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm geboren. Sie hat um 1658 Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm è nata il circa 1634 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm. Lei sposato Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers circa 1658. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholmは約1634年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでAlexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholmの娘として生まれた。約1658年にHugh Fraser 7th of Foyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm(은)는 대략 1634년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1658년 Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm nasceu aproximadamente 1634, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm. Ela casou-se com Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers aproximadamente 1658. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine-nic-Alexander Chisholm of Chisholm родилась около 1634 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Alexander-mac-John Chisholm of Comar - 17th of Chisholm. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers около 1658 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

Se casó con Hugh Fraser 7th of Foyers aproximadamente 1658. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
